sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70180" key="nemh/i+os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεμήϊος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, epith. of Zeus, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archyt.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.1.138</biblScope> </bibl> (expld. as from <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νέμω</foreign>).</entryFree>
